naso-pharyngo-laryngoscope.title: Naso-Pharyngo-Laryngoscope
description: Our Naso-Pharyngo-Laryngoscopes, proudly manufactured by EMOS Technology GmbH are a flagship product in our portfolio. Combining innovative design, cutting-edge technology, and exceptional image quality at competitive prices, they set new standards in ENT diagnostics.

Available with or without a working channel, these scopes feature advanced fiber-optic technology that deliver crisp, high-resolution images, enhancing diagnostic confidence. The Ergonomic design ensures procedures are more comfortable for both patients and clinicians, making examinations smoother, faster, and more precise.

keyFeatures.title: Without Working channel
features: Insertion tube: Ø 2.2 mm, Ø 2.8 mm, Ø 3.2 mm, Ø 3.4 mm

keyFeatures.title: With Working channel
features: Insertion tube / Working channel: Ø 2.8 mm / Ø 1.2 mm, Ø 3.8 mm / Ø 1.4 mm

semi-flexible-nephroscope.title: Semi-Flexible Nephroscope
description: Highlighting its hybrid design, the EMOS Semi-Flexible Nephroscope offers the perfect balance of flexibility and precise control, simplifying navigation through complex kidney procedures. Its compact profile minimizes patient trauma, high-quality imaging allows clear visuals for accurate diagnostics, and the integrated working channel facilitates seamless operational procedure

flexible-ureterorenoscopes.title: Flexible Ureterorenoscopes 8.4/7.5 Fr.
description: Where innovation meets design — The EMOS Flexible Ureterorenoscopes with working channel combines a slim shaft design, smooth deflection control, and an integrated working channel support for precise instrument handling and efficient irrigation. This construction enables comfortable, fatigue-free operation, delivering reliability and control throughout clinical interventions

keyFeatures.title: Technical Data
features: Insertion tube: Ø 2.8 mm / Ø 8.4 Fr.

rigid-ureterorenoscopes.title: Rigid Ureterorenoscopes
description: Versatility in shape and size define the Rigid Ureterorenoscopes from EMOS Technology GmbH, engineered for reliable access and optimal control in urological procedures. Its robust shaft design ensures smooth insertion and stability, while high-quality optics deliver bright, sharp visualization for accurate diagnostics and effective intervention

endoscopy-accessories.title: Endoscopy Accessories
description: EMOS Technology GmbH provides a comprehensive range of high-quality endoscopy accessories designed for use with both flexible and rigid endoscopes. Tailored to your specific applications and system requirements, our product portfolio allows you to easily select the appropriate accessories.

endovision-units.title: Endovision Units
description: EMOS Endovision Units are designed to deliver reliable performance and outstanding image quality for modern endoscopic procedures. Combining advanced imaging technology with intuitive operation, they provide clear, detailed visualization to support accurate diagnostics and efficient workflows. Engineered for compatibility with both Flexible and Rigid endoscopes, these systems ensure seamless integration, stability, and user-friendly control in any clinical setting.
